notes:
The big one — two new sources, glass everywhere, a new face.

NEW SOURCES: Royal Road (LitRPG + progression fantasy, 1000-chapter serials in one shot), Wattpad (werewolf + fantasy romance), Project Gutenberg classics. Stories now searches every source at once.

LISTENING: Bluetooth, car and headset controls with cover art. "Story so far" recaps summarized on your device. Player rebuilt — glowing waveform, rimmed cover, a scrubber you can grab.

LOOK: New icon and splash. Every sheet is real frosted glass. Mini-player on glass with a tide progress line. Continue button, puddle ripples and palette all reworked.

FIXED: Gutenberg listed chapters back to front. The Books tab never showed its popular list. Reader settings overflowed its sheet. Source pills broke past four. Wattpad opened audiobooks by narrating the copyright notice.

Full changelog: github.com/LucidEncode/mangarain-releases/releases
